channel.title: Tips on Purple Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Tips on Purple Blog

item.title: Argentina Travelogue (Final): In Bariloche, Wasting Time Amidst Lakes and Mountains
item.description: This post recounts my itinerary and experiences in Bariloche. Portions can be used as a practical travel guide.

item.title: Argentina Travelogue (IV): Ushuaia—In the Lonely End of the World, There are Still Friends
item.description: This post recounts my itinerary and experiences in Ushuaia. Portions can be used as a practical travel guide.

item.title: Argentina Travelogue (III): Spending $1000 in 48 Hours: My Perito Moreno Glacier 'Special Forces' Trip
item.description:
🔥 Key Takeaways

  1. After this trip to Argentina, I’ve realized that to truly save money, I must force myself to become a meticulous planner for future long-distance travels;

  2. Be more direct when speaking; foreigners often don’t understand subtext or “hidden meanings”;

  3. The glacier is absolutely worth seeing; the actual sight is incredibly breathtaking and worth every penny;

  4. The local roasted lamb is excellent; it’s a paradise for carnivores;

  5. When flying in South America, always leave plenty of buffer time;

item.title: Argentina Travelogue (II): Stepping into Iguazu, Enveloped by Roaring Waters, Lush Greens, and Wild Creatures
item.description: This post mainly recounts the trip to Iguazu Falls.

item.title: Argentina Travelogue (I): Buenos Aires, South America’s Purple City
item.description: Having just wrapped up my trip to Argentina, it felt both like a reunion with old friends and a brand-new adventure.

item.title: Da Nang Tết Survival Guide: How I Learned the Hard Way to Avoid Becoming a 'Sitting Duck'
item.description: The Lunar New Year in Da Nang felt like a high-stakes trial. Despite the physical toll of illness and anxiety, my soul found healing in conversations that transcended borders.
